title: MELTS: Attack Path Link Drilldown
description: Link analysis for the 2025-2026 campaign. Groups trace IDs to log sources so analysts can pivot from entry point to host execution, cloud abuse, C2, and exfiltration evidence.
query: ('Trace ID' = 'trace_clickfix_2026_001' or 'Trace ID' = 'trace_toolshell_sp_001' or 'Trace ID' = 'trace_rmm_2025_001' or 'Trace ID' = 'trace_aitm_token_2026_001' or 'Threat Name' = 'ClickFix Clipboard Execution' or 'Threat Name' = 'CrashFix Python RAT' or 'Threat Name' = 'RMM Tool Abuse' or 'Threat Name' = 'AiTM Token Replay' or 'Request URL' like '*spinstall0.aspx*' or 'Command Line' like '*ClickFix*' or 'Command Line' like '*CrashFix*' or 'Process Name' like '*ScreenConnect*' or 'Process Name' like '*AnyDesk*' or 'Process Name' like '*AteraAgent*' or 'User Name' = 'codeofconduct-reader@corp.example.com') | link span = 15minute 'Trace ID', 'Log Source' | eventstats max(Count) as PeakEvents, sum(Count) as Events, distinctcount('Trace ID') as Traces, distinctcount('Log Source') as Sources

visualizationOptions.tileLayoutXml: <title-text>Peak Path</title-text><title-text>Evidence</title-text><title-text>Traces</title-text><title-text>Log Sources</title-text>

ask_ai_prompts: Trace each attack path from entry point to exfiltration.
Identify missing telemetry for any trace group.
